# ⚡ Quick Start - AI Skills in 2 Minutes

## The Three Skills Installed

| Skill | Command | What It Does | Key Benefit |
|-------|---------|-------------|-------------|
| **🎨 Impeccable** | `/impeccable` | Design UI/UX with 23 commands | Professional design without guessing |
| **🪨 Caveman** | `/caveman` | Compress output to 75% fewer tokens | Save API costs, faster responses |
| **🚀 Autoskills** | `npx autoskills` | Install skills for your tech stack | Auto-discover best tools |

## 🎯 Use Right Now

### Try Impeccable Design
```
/impeccable audit src/app          # Find design issues
```

You'll get:
- ✅ Accessibility checks (a11y, contrast)
- ✅ Responsive design validation
- ✅ Performance issues
- ✅ Specific fixes recommended

### Try Caveman Compression
```
/caveman ultra
```

Then ask a technical question. You'll get ~75% fewer tokens but same accuracy.

### Try Autoskills Detection
```
npx autoskills --dry-run
```

See what skills would be installed for your tech (Angular + TypeScript + Node.js).

## 📝 Most Useful Commands

### Impeccable Shortcuts (Create Once, Use Always)

```bash
/impeccable pin audit      # Creates /audit
/impeccable pin colorize   # Creates /colorize
/impeccable pin layout     # Creates /layout
/impeccable pin polish     # Creates /polish
/impeccable pin animate    # Creates /animate
```

Then use directly:
```
/audit dashboard               # Same as /impeccable audit dashboard
/layout forms                  # Same as /impeccable layout forms
/colorize header               # Same as /impeccable colorize header
```

### Caveman Modes

```bash
/caveman lite                  # Professional, keep grammar
/caveman full                  # Default, medium compression
/caveman ultra                 # Maximum compression

/caveman-commit                # Terse commit messages
/caveman-review src/           # One-line PR reviews
/caveman-stats                 # See token savings
stop caveman                   # Deactivate
```

### Autoskills

```bash
npx autoskills                 # Auto-detect & install
npx autoskills --dry-run       # Preview only
npx autoskills -y              # Skip confirmation
```

## 🚀 5-Minute Setup

### 1. Create Design Context (Optional but Recommended)
```bash
/impeccable teach
```
Answer 5 quick questions about your product. Creates PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md.

### 2. Create Shortcuts
```bash
/impeccable pin audit
/impeccable pin colorize
/impeccable pin layout
/impeccable pin polish
```

### 3. Try Caveman Mode
```bash
/caveman ultra
```
Ask any technical question and watch the output compress.

### 4. Auto-Install Tech Skills (Optional)
```bash
npx autoskills
```

**Done!** 🎉 Your skills are ready.

## 💡 Real-World Examples

### Redesign a Dashboard
```
/impeccable shape dashboard        # Plan the redesign
/caveman full                      # Enable compression for efficiency
/impeccable craft dashboard        # Build with iteration
/impeccable audit dashboard        # Quality check
/impeccable polish dashboard       # Shipping ready
/caveman-stats                     # Check token savings
```

### Quick Design Audit
```
/audit components                  # Find design issues
/colorize buttons                  # Add strategic color
/layout forms                      # Fix spacing
/polish checkout                   # Final pass
```

### Code Review in Caveman
```
/caveman full
[Review code normally]
/caveman-review src/              # One-line feedback
stop caveman                      # Switch back to normal
```

## 🎨 Design Laws Enforced by Impeccable

✅ DO:
- Use OKLCH color space with tinted neutrals
- Vary spacing for rhythm
- Keep typography hierarchy with scale + weight
- Use easing curves (ease-out-quart/expo)

❌ DON'T:
- Pure black/white (always tint)
- Side-stripe borders
- Gradient text
- Bounce/elastic easing
- Nested cards
- Identical card grids

## 📊 Token Savings with Caveman

| Task | Normal | Caveman | Savings |
|------|--------|---------|---------|
| React bug explanation | 1180 | 159 | **87%** |
| Auth middleware fix | 704 | 121 | **83%** |
| PostgreSQL setup | 2347 | 380 | **84%** |
| Git rebase vs merge | 702 | 292 | **58%** |
| Average | 1214 | 294 | **65%** |

## 🔧 File Locations

```
.github/
├── AGENTS.md                           # Skill registration
├── copilot-instructions.md             # Auto-activation rules
├── SETUP.md                            # Full setup guide
├── QUICK_START.md                      # This file
└── skills/
    ├── README.md                       # Skills usage guide
    ├── impeccable/SKILL.md             # Design skill
    ├── caveman/SKILL.md                # Compression skill
    └── autoskills/SKILL.md             # Tech detection skill
```

## ❓ Quick Troubleshooting

**Skills not showing?**
- Restart VS Code
- Verify `.github/skills/*/SKILL.md` exist

**Impeccable not working?**
- Run `/impeccable teach` first
- Make sure PRODUCT.md exists

**Caveman output too short?**
- Use `/caveman lite` instead of `/caveman ultra`

**Autoskills not detecting tech?**
- Ensure `package.json` is in project root
- Run `npx autoskills --dry-run` to see detection
